mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.project_id, b.model_id, b.planned_qty, b.received_qty, b.installed_qty, b.accepted_qty, b.remark, b.create_time, b.update_time, m.model_name, m.model_code, m.product_line FROM device_bom b LEFT JOIN device_model m ON m.id = b.model_id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0 AND b.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY b.create_time ASC, b.id ASC

SELECT id, project_id, model_id, planned_qty, received_qty, installed_qty, accepted_qty, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM device_bom WHERE deleted = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId} AND model_id = #{modelId} LIMIT 1

SELECT b.id, b.project_id, b.model_id, b.planned_qty, b.received_qty, b.installed_qty, b.accepted_qty, b.remark, b.create_time, b.update_time, m.model_name, m.model_code, m.product_line FROM device_bom b LEFT JOIN device_model m ON m.id = b.model_id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.deleted = 0
